---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Abridged
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary

**A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.**

## Problem/Motivation

**What problem does this solve? Why do you want this feature?**

Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

**Describe how you envision this feature working.**

## Alternative Solutions

**Have you considered any alternative approaches? Describe them here.**

## User Stories (Optional)

**Describe how users would interact with this feature:**

- As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [benefit]
- As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [benefit]

## Design Mockups (Optional)

**If you have wireframes, sketches, or design ideas, attach them here.**

## Technical Considerations

**Are there any technical challenges or dependencies we should be aware of?**

- Does this affect performance?
- Does this require new dependencies?
- Does this impact iOS/Android differently?

## Scope

**How big is this feature?**

- [ ] Small (hours)
- [ ] Medium (days)
- [ ] Large (weeks)
- [ ] Unsure

## Related Features/Issues

**Link to related issues, ADRs, or documentation:**

- Related to: #
- Blocked by: #
- Relates to ADR: [ADR-XXXX](../docs/standards/adr/XXXX-name.md)

## Additional Context

**Any other context, screenshots, or examples from other apps.**

---

### For Maintainers

**Triage Checklist:**
- [ ] Feature aligns with product vision (see `docs/product/vision.md`)
- [ ] Feature fits within architectural patterns (see ADRs)
- [ ] Scope estimated
- [ ] Priority assigned
- [ ] Design standards considered (`docs/standards/design-standards.md`)
- [ ] Accessibility implications reviewed (`docs/standards/a11y-audit.md`)
